name: MOBIVITY HOLDINGS CORP.
business: Mobivity Holdings Corp. develops and operates a proprietary platform for data-driven marketing campaigns. Its Recurrency platform generates revenue as a SaaS for convenience and quick service restaurant brands, and through Connected Rewards which rewards digital actions with real-world products.

exposures.sentence: Our Recurrency platform is designed to leverage point-of-sale data, along with cognitive computing, to increase visits, spend, and loyalty from consumers.
Through our Connected Rewards platform, we enable businesses to reward their users and customers with products in the real world for actions taken in a digital environment.
